---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-single">
  <div class="content">

    <!-- Published -->
    <section class="section reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Research</div>

      <div class="section-subhead">Published</div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">Digital Provision Inclusion in Trade Agreements: the Death of (Digital) Distance through a Gravity Model Approach</div>
        <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong> (2025). <em>European Journal of International Relations</em>. <span class="pub-status">OnlineFirst</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">Mapping the ROAD to Democracy: A Global Dataset of Overturning Attempts and Organizations in Civil Resistance Transitions</div>
        <div class="pub-meta">Elmore, Naela, Kashmiri Medhi, <strong>Giuseppe Peressotti</strong>, and Jonathan Pinckney (2025). <em>Journal of Peace Research</em>. <span class="pub-status">Forthcoming</span></div>
      </div>

      <div class="section-subhead">Working Papers</div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">Why Take a Detour: The Choice Between Bilateral and Mega-PTAs</div>
        <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong>, Huei-Jyun Ye</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">The Regionalism of Digital Globalization: a Network Analysis of Digital Provisions as Part of Preferential Trade Agreements</div>
        <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong></div>
      </div>
      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">The Impact of Intellectual Property Provisions as Part of PTAs: Can Institutional Quality be a Driver of Innovation?</div>
        <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong></div>
      </div>

      <div class="section-subhead">Work in Progress</div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">The Moral Economy of Informality: Trust, Reciprocity, and Entrepreneurial Coordination in Guatemala</div>
        <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong>, Ricardo R. Noe</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">Watch Your Back: Identifying Overturning Organizations in Civil Resistance Transitions</div>
        <div class="pub-meta">Elmore, Naela, <strong>Giuseppe Peressotti</strong>, Maitreyi Pillai, Jonathan Pinckney</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-title">The Determinants of Prospective BRICS+ Accession: Toward Institutional Homogeneity?</div>
        <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong>, Kelvin Chun Man Chan, Minh Dao, Sadman Shafiq</div>
      </div>
    </section>

  </div>
</div>

<footer>
  <p class="footer-text">&copy; 2026 Giuseppe Peressotti</p>
</footer>
```
